_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide SME support for the development and implementation of exercises.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated retraining pipelines, model versioning, A/B testing infrastructure, and canary deployment patterns.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.383), DG-T-002 (DG, cosine: 0.383).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.238). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [development, exercises, implementation, provide, sme, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.842 (P=0.869, R=0.817). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Provide SME support for the development and implementation of exercises." and "Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated r" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.400 > STS 0.238 (gap +0.163). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [development, exercises, implementation, provide, sme, support]. WIDAI terms: [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment].
